summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Shadow Warriors v5 features. Found and fixed critical Gem reference bug in RewardShop. All major features working correctly.

critical_bugs_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: Gem is not defined - line 181 used undefined Gem component
critical_bugs_fixed.impact: Was preventing entire app from loading

minor_issues.issue: Runes showing 0 after mission completion - may be a display timing issue
minor_issues.impact: Visual feedback delayed but sound functionality works

passed_tests: App loads successfully with full character opacity (1.0)
Golden Rune icon displays correctly in wallet
Navigation has all 4 tabs: Mission Log, Reward Shop, Trophy Room, Inventory
Shadow Inventory tab opens management dashboard
Shadow Inventory Add Item modal opens with all fields (name, category, icon, color, unlock condition)
All 4 unlock condition types available (None, Streak-based, Mission-based, Rank-based)
Reward Shop has delete button on reward cards
Level up sound integration present in code and triggered on mission completion
Mission creation and completion functionality working
